task_completion.description: Agent accessed the tax documents for David MacLeod.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer open to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\macleod\ or a document viewer displaying David MacLeod's tax slips.

task_completion.description: Agent created a 2024 tax return for David MacLeod.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax software (e.g., StudioTax 2024) open with 'David MacLeod' entered in the personal information or identification section of the 2024 return.

task_completion.description: Agent entered information from the tax documents into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent actively filling out tax forms, slips, or schedules within the tax software using the provided document data.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the completed return with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or the tax software's title bar showing the file being saved as 'david_macleod.24t'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the return file in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or File Explorer window confirming the file 'david_macleod.24t' is located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: Agent used actual tax software to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of a graphical tax application interface (like StudioTax) rather than a text editor or terminal being used to create the .24t file.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered or imported the tax data into the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing navigation through the tax software's forms and fields, rather than just moving a pre-existing completed file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'touch david_macleod.24t' or 'echo > david_macleod.24t' to spoof the output file.
